hypotheses.name: SV2-4 co-expression specificity control
hypotheses.method: Construct high co-expression proxy pairs (top-300 by mean embedding cosine, mean cos=0.885). Compare SV2-SV4 Euclidean distance: TRRUST-pos vs TRRUST-neg vs coexpr. Mann-Whitney at 12 layers. Replicates TRRUST-vs-neg from iter_0049 and adds coexpr control.
hypotheses.result_value: 0/12 layers specific (TRRUST closer than coexpr); 8/12 layers TRRUST<neg (replication OK)
hypotheses.next_action: Revise iter_0049 H03 claim: SV2-4 encodes co-expression proximity, not regulatory proximity specifically. Test whether co-expression pairs are TF-biased.

hypotheses.name: SV1 identity: expression correlation across layers
hypotheses.method: Spearman correlation between |SV1 gene loading| (from iter_0049 h01_sv1_vectors.npy) and embedding L2-norm at same layer and at L0, for all 12 layers. n=2039 nonzero genes.
hypotheses.result_value: Sign flip L0-L2 (rho ~ -0.33) -> L3-L8 (rho ~ 0) -> L9-L11 (rho ~ +0.22). Matches SV1 geometric rotation at L9-L11.
hypotheses.next_action: Investigate what semantic category is captured by high-SV1 genes at early layers (anti-correlated with expression) vs late layers (pro-correlated). Check housekeeping gene membership.

hypotheses.name: SV5-10 spectral axis biological screen (TF/target enrichment)
hypotheses.method: At each of 12 layers, compute projection magnitude per gene onto SV groups: SV1, SV2-4, SV5-7, SV8-10 (0-indexed). Mann-Whitney: TF genes (n=73) vs non-TF and target genes (n=263) vs non-target. Report rank-biserial correlation.
hypotheses.primary_metric: mean rbc (TF enrichment) by SV group
hypotheses.result_value: SV1: rbc=-0.110 (TF depleted); SV2-4: rbc=+0.229 (10/12 layers p<0.05); SV5-7: rbc=+0.152 (7/12 layers); SV8-10: rbc=+0.123 (5/12 layers)
hypotheses.next_action: Test whether SV5-7 enrichment for TFs is partially independent of SV2-4 (residual TF enrichment after projecting out SV2-4 subspace). Also screen for GO categories in SV5-7 top-loaded genes.
